display_text: Pavise, Cost: 1400: Grants an ally a physical damage barrier that absorbs 250 damage for 7 seconds. Has a 16-second cooldown and costs 60 mana to cast. A single-target defensive tool ideal for protecting fragile heroes against burst damage. Stats: CD: 16s, Mana Cost: 60, Absorb: 250, Duration: 7s.

display_text: Pavise, Cost: 1400: Provides a balanced mix of survivability and mana pool with +175 Health and +250 Mana. Also offers +3 Armor, improving physical damage resistance. Stats: Health: +175, Mana: +250, Armor: +3.

display_text: Pavise, Cost: 1400: Provides a single-target defensive save in team fights, shielding a key ally from the initial burst of physical damage. Its low cooldown allows it to be used multiple times in prolonged engagements. Stats: CD: 16s.

display_text: Pavise, Cost: 1400: Counters heroes with high physical burst damage (e.g., Phantom Assassin, Templar Assassin). The 250-damage shield is effective against right-click focused heroes or abilities with physical damage spikes. Stats: Absorb: 250.

display_text: Pavise, Cost: 1400: Synergizes with heroes who have low base armor or need to survive initial magic damage to retaliate. Good for supports protecting their position 1 or 2 cores. The +250 mana also supports ability casting for mana-hungry supports. Stats: Mana: +250.
